c.d: The number of movies and TV shows available on the app, including exclusives and originals
Whether the app requires a subscription, offers free content, or uses a freemium/ad-supported model
Ability to integrate or link with other streaming services and personal media libraries for unified access
Ease of finding, bookmarking, and streaming movies including watchlist features
Options to share watchlists and get recommendations from friends and social networks
Access to free movies and TV shows without a subscription
